About

Colleen Peoples

UX Designer based in the US

I'm a UX designer with over a decade of experience helping companies build intuitive, human-centered products. I've led design at XPO Logistics, Seagate, and LaCie — working across enterprise software, consumer hardware, mobile apps, and packaging.


My process starts with understanding people: their frustrations, mental models, and goals. From there I move through ideation, prototyping, and testing until the design earns its place.


I care about craft, clarity, and collaboration — and I believe the best design decisions happen when everyone at the table is working toward the same problem.
